prestazioni: Engine swap to Nissan's VQ35HR (3.5L V6, 306hp stock) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold (Tomei or HKS) and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei M82 cast exhaust manifold for optimized exhaust flow and reduced turbo lag. Supporting mods include a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller, HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Tomei 70mm titanium tip.

Full forged internals upgrade: Manley forged pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S forged crankshaft. The engine is paired with a K1 Technologies lightweight flywheel and a SPEC Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch for improved throttle response and power transfer. A custom radiator (Koyorad 4-core) and an oil cooler (Setrab 625) ensure thermal stability under high boost (1.2 bar target).

Chassis-specific suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (NV350-specific valving) with Eibach ERS springs (20% stiffer than stock) and polyurethane bushings (Whiteline) for the front control arms and rear trailing arms. A Cusco 2-point strut tower brace and a custom rear subframe brace (fabricated by Garage Defend) reduce chassis flex. Braking is upgraded to Endless CC-RG6 6-piston front calipers with 355mm rotors and 4-piston rear calipers with 330mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny NV350-specific kit (Pandem Design), featuring extended front fenders (2.5-inch wider), rear quarter panels (3-inch wider), and a carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks. The kit includes a custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for NV350) and a rear wing (Voltex Type-3, 1,800mm width) mounted on aluminum pedestals for adjustability.

Full carbon fiber exterior upgrade: Seibon carbon fiber hood (NV350-specific, 50% lighter than stock) with a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling, carbon fiber side skirts (VIS Racing), and a carbon fiber roof (Seibon) with a custom sunroof delete panel. The mirrors are replaced with carbon fiber units (Aero Catch) and the door handles are shaved for a seamless look, with remote keyless entry (Vi-PEC) integrated into the B-pillar.

Interior overhaul: Full custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 6-point, TIG-welded) with bolt-in door bars and a harness bar for 4-point Schroth Profi II harnesses. The stock seats are replaced with Bride Zeta III (fixed-back) with custom NV350-specific mounting brackets. The dashboard is replaced with a carbon fiber unit (AutoPower Industries) housing a Motec C127 dash display, and the center console is custom-fabricated with a quick-shift mechanism (TWM) and a hydraulic handbrake (Wilwood). The headliner is replaced with Alcantara (Stitches Auto) and the door cards are reupholstered in black leather with red stitching (Recaro Sportster CS).
